rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Story') AND status in ('In Review')

rules.description: Merged Stories → Ready For Testing + generate test cases
rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Story') AND status in ('Merged')

rules.description: Backlog Test Cases → In Development + automate
rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Test Case') AND status in ('Backlog')

rules.description: In Review Test Cases → trigger pr_test_automation_review
rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Test Case') AND status in ('In Review - Passed', 'In Review - Failed')

rules.description: In Rework Test Cases → trigger pr_test_automation_rework
rules.jql: project = MYTUBE AND issuetype in ('Test Case') AND status in ('In Rework')
